name: Hot and Sour Mushroom Soup (Tom Yam Het)
recipeIngredient: 1 inch Lemon grass, finely chopped into rings
3 Kaffir lime leaves, roughly torn into three pieces
2 small Fresh red or green chilies, crushed to split open
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, bring the vegetable stock to a boil and stir in the Nam Prik Pow sauce.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and simmer, stirring well until the mushrooms are just cooked but still al dente.
3. Pour into a serving bowl and garnish with coriander leaves.
